mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.code FROM tenant_member tm JOIN auth_role r ON r.code = tm.role_code AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 JOIN auth_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.deleted = 0 JOIN auth_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.deleted = 0 AND tm.status = 1
